identity.name: Comedy Cellar
identity.address: 117 MacDougal St, New York, NY 10012, USA
identity.location: 117 MacDougal St, New York, NY 10012, USA

narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

MacDougal St between W 3rd and Minetta Lane — look for the neon sign and the stairs going down.

The most important comedy club in America. Where Chappelle drops in. Where Seinfeld cut his teeth. Where the next great comic is bombing right now.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

MacDougal St between W 3rd and Minetta Lane — look for the neon sign and the stairs going down.

You descend into the basement and the room shrinks to maybe 115 seats. The ceiling is low. The stage is close enough to touch. This is the Comedy Cellar — where legends sharpen their material and unknowns become legends. Chappelle, Rock, Seinfeld, Schumer, Mulaney — they've all stood on this tiny stage. On any given night, a headliner might drop in unannounced to work out new bits.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Brick walls, low ceilings, cocktail tables packed tight. You're in the comedian's living room. The intimacy is the point — you can see the sweat, the pauses, the moment a joke lands or dies. The original room holds about 115; the Village Underground next door and Fat Black Pussycat upstairs expand the empire. The Olive Tree Café above serves as the legendary green room where comics eat between sets.

blocks.title: The Show
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗪

Typical lineups run 5-7 comics per show, each doing 15-20 minutes. The house emcee warms you up, then it's a parade of talent — established headliners mixed with rising stars. Drop-in sets happen regularly, especially late-night on weekends. You might see someone testing material for a Netflix special.

⭐ The late shows (9:30pm+) are where surprise drop-ins happen most
⭐ Weeknight shows often have the best lineups — comics trying new material

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$$

Cover: ~$24-35 + two-drink minimum
Drinks: $10-16 cocktails, $8-12 beer/wine

Reservations: Book online at comedycellar.com — shows sell out, especially weekends

🌐 comedycellar.com
📞 (212) 254-3480

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Shows daily 11:00 AM – 3:00 AM
Multiple shows nightly (typically 7:30, 9:30, 11:30)

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Tuesday/Wednesday: Comics testing new material, smaller crowds
• Late Saturday (11:30pm): Drop-in territory
• Arrive 30 min early — seating is first-come in the room
